name: wp-labs-starter
description: WP Labs Claude Code starter: shared coding-standard skills, common-task workflows, repo SDLC scaffolding, and a curated plugin setup.

plugins.name: wp-labs-standards
plugins.description: Coding-standard skills (general + Python, TypeScript/React, CSS, SQL) and the team docs-path convention, plus common-task workflows: /commit, git-pr-prepare, and github-pr-review.

plugins.name: wp-labs-sdlc
plugins.description: Repo SDLC bootstrapping: the scaffolding-sdlc skill wires lint/test/e2e/security gates, Dependabot, PR-status labels, pre-commit hooks, hosting (Docker + Azure Bicep), and Claude PR automation onto a repo.

plugins.name: wp-labs-superpowers
plugins.description: Opt-in vendored fork of superpowers with the team docs-path convention baked in. Enable instead of stock superpowers, never both.
